title: What to Book in Advance in Berlin - Quick Summary
items: **Book the Reichstag dome first** if you want the free parliament view. It requires advance registration, names and valid ID.
**Book timed paid attractions only when the slot shapes the day:** TV Tower sunset, Museum Island must-sees, palace interiors, special events or a restaurant you would hate to miss.
**Do not pre-book normal public transport.** Buy the right AB or ABC ticket when your route is clear, and validate paper tickets before riding.
**Keep casual food and outdoor sightseeing flexible.** Berlin works better when every hour is not locked into a reservation.
**Use the planner below** to sort your own trip into book now, book this week, wait, and do not pre-book.
